Defendants Citywide Council Senior Disabled And Beverly Saba'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar May-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Charles Abernathy (415-286-4621) Plaintiff/opposing party in pro per.
Peter N. Hadiaris (415-433-4800) for Defendant/Moving party Citywide Council Senior Disabled And Beverly Saba.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Plaintiff ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants Citywide Council Senior Disabled And Beverly Saba'S Demurrer To Complaint is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff lacks standing and fails to state a cause of action. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS CITYWIDE COUNCIL SENIOR DISABLED and BEVERLY SABA's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT -
This demurrer will be heard in department 501 at 9:30am on May 19, 2017. All future motions in this case should be noticed to department 501. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
